description: Back in the present, Simmons finishes recounting her ordeal to Fitz. Deeply emotional and weighed by everything she experienced, she pleads with Fitz to understand. After a moment of tension, Fitz silently storms out, only for Simmons to find him already starting research, resolved to help her rescue Will from the alien planet.

transcript.line: I don't know what happened to him...
... if he's alive or dead. But I never would have survived without him. Talk to me, Fitz. Please. Oh, God. Please, Fitz, I need you to understand.
Well, then why won't you talk to me? What are you doing?
